comment: FR-SPD-002 within-clip freeze: the curve ramps at 4x for 1/4s (keyframes 0->0, 1/4->1), then holds source time 1 (frame 128 of 128 fps frame-index-coded media) until 3/2. Sampling t=1/2 inside the zero-slope span must decode source frame 128. The paired time-remap-freeze-hold-late fixture samples t=5/4 against the same held frame, proving the span holds. Ignoring the curve (1x) would decode frame 64 here and flattening to the constant-rate chord (2/3x) would decode frame 42; both are >= 64 green levels away.
